name: SiteHeader
usage_hint: Combined announcement bar + navigation bar in one unified header component. Announcement supports rotation, dismissal, and session persistence.
when_to_use: When you need both announcement bar and navigation in a single sticky header unit. Announcement auto-rotates messages, persists dismissal in sessionStorage. Use this OR (Navbar + AnnouncementBar separately), not both.
when_not_to_use: If you only need navigation without announcement, use Navbar alone. If announcement should scroll away while nav stays sticky, use separate AnnouncementBar + Navbar.
anti_patterns: Using SiteHeader AND Navbar on the same page — they duplicate functionality
Multiple SiteHeader instances — there should be one site-wide header
Setting announcement messages that are too long (causes mobile overflow — keep under 60 chars)

examples.label: Hydration mode with rotating announcements
